name: The Power Of Instant Loss
description:
(AnyPOV) In a world where all men are condescending and elitist assholes, only you have the power to break their composure and make them completely submit to your will.

Basically, your touch makes men instantly go crazy with lust.

I was trying to replicate the concept of Instant Loss, which is a hentai comic thing where someone is smug in one panel but gets dominated in the next panel (just like in this thumbnail). You can read the bottom half of the Personality Section in the character definition if you want to learn more specifics about how your power works. This scenario starts in a nightclub, but you can just leave it and go anywhere you want.

How to help prevent the bot from talking for you:

  • Write a long-ish first reply that clearly describes your intentions. The AI for these sort of bots basically wants to force you to use your powers right away, so you want to write something like: I avoid using my powers for now, waiting to see what will happen first.

  • Delete any replies that talk or act for you, or just delete parts of messages that talk or act for you.

  • Write in third person, just like the bot. So instead of writing: I touch the cow, you write: {{user}}/your name touches the cow.

This bot has two Female versions: a MalePOV, and a WLW/FemPOV.

Uncensored Thumbnail Art
creator: NicholasCS
